name: Mujadarah with Caramelized Onions (Lentil and Rice Pilaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lentils in 4 cups of boiling water until tender, about 10 to 15 minutes.
2. Drain the cooked lentils.
3. In a large saucepan, combine the lentils with rice and broth. Bring to a boil,
then immediately lower to a simmer. Simmer until all liquid has evaporated
and the rice is tender.
4. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Sauté the sliced onions
until they are dark golden brown.
5. Add butter to the skillet and stir to melt it.
6. Taste the pilaf, adjusting salt and pepper as needed.
7. Pour the caramelized onions over the pilaf and serve immediately.
Yield: Makes 6 to 8 servings.
